center.name: Carlo Piaggia
center.summary: Carlo Piaggia是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Abyssinian ground thrush，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Abyssinian ground thrush (Geokichla piaggiae) is a thrush from the family Turdidae which is native to north-east Africa where it lives at high altitude in montane forests. Its binomial nomenclature honors the 19th century Italian explorer of East Africa Carlo Piaggia.{{cite journal|title=Carlo Piaggia, the definition of "gallery forests", and forest avifauna in Central Africa|date=31 December 2023|volume=40|pages=157-170|author=Spartaco Gippoliti|author2=Luca Lupi |journal=Boll
